title: SomeAssemblyRequired Addons
description: adds new bread items for some assembly required
body:
Adds new bread variants for some assembly required as well as new condiments with associated crops.

- Yellow and Brown Mustard Crops
- Ketchup, yellow mustard, dijon mustard, and mustard aioli liquids and bottles added
- Sourdough bread, potato buns, and pretzel buns
Mainly used for custom modpack focused around some assembly required
